creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
To go into the audit trail.

On 18 June 2011 18:59, Evaldas Auryla <ea@zaib.as> wrote:
>
> Hi Chris, yes, the lib depends should look like this:
>
> LIB_DEPENDS+=3D =A0 ldap-2:${PORTSDIR}/net/openldap24-sasl-client
> LIB_DEPENDS+=3D =A0 sasl2:${PORTSDIR}/security/cyrus-sasl2
>
> But now I have trouble testing this port on 8.2-Stable, the ports
> compiles, but the binary segfaults when it starts SASL/GSSAPI
> authentication, something's broken with ldap/sasl libs, I'll try to get
> back to it when I'll have more time. Please ignore this port for the
> moment, thank you.
>
> Best regards,
> Evaldas
>
>
